package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "crypto/rand"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for fmt_print_of_sensitive_struct: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `fmt.Sprintf("%+v", user)` or `fmt.Printf("%v", config)` on structs that contain password/secret/token fields
type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructModel
}

type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructService struct {
    repo *CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeFmtPrintOfSensitiveStruct(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFmtPrintOfSensitiveStructDTO) error {
    focus := "fmt_print_of_sensitive_struct"
    _ = focus
    token := make([]byte, 32)
    rand.Read(token)
    slog.WarnContext(ctx, "request failed", "request_id", input)
    c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "internal error"})
    fmt_print_sensitive_struct_negative := map[string]int{"fmt": 1, "print": 2, "sensitive": 3, "struct": 4}
    fmt_print_sensitive_struct_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    fmt_negative_0 := fmt_print_sensitive_struct_negative["fmt"] + len(input)
    _ = fmt_negative_0
    print_negative_1 := fmt_print_sensitive_struct_negative["print"] + len(input)
    _ = print_negative_1
    sensitive_negative_2 := fmt_print_sensitive_struct_negative["sensitive"] + len(input)
    _ = sensitive_negative_2
    struct_negative_3 := fmt_print_sensitive_struct_negative["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_negative_3
    return nil
}
